src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Threa.general_idea: Add imports for Executors, ThreadFactory, TaskExecutor, and TaskExecutorAdapter required for virtual thread configuration.
Refactor thread pool constants to class level and adjust values (maxPoolSize 100->300, keepAliveTime 10->60, queueCapacity 200->100).
Replace the default taskExecutor bean with a virtual thread-based executor using Java 21 Thread.ofVirtual().
Rename the original platform task executor bean to platformTaskExecutor to avoid conflict with the new virtual thread taskExecutor.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Threa.before:
@Bean("taskExecutor") // bean的名称，默认为首字母小写的方法名
    public ThreadPoolTaskExecutor taskExecutor(){
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Threa.after:
@Bean("platformTaskExecutor") // bean的名称，默认为首字母小写的方法名
  public ThreadPoolTaskExecutor taskExecutor() {

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/UserD.general_idea: Add Apache License header to the source file.
Add import for cn.hutool.core.lang.Validator to support email validation.
Add import for top.rslly.iot.models.UserEntity to support typed list declaration.
Refactor indentation and formatting of the class body.
Comment out the unused Logger field declaration.
Change exception type from RuntimeException to UsernameNotFoundException for empty username check.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/UserD.before: throw new RuntimeException("用户不能为空");

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/UserD.general_idea: Add logic to check if input is an email and query by email if so, otherwise query by username.
Extract username from the found user entity to use in the returned UserDetails object.
Use the extracted username instead of the input string when constructing the UserDetails object.
